title: Contract: Gas Optimization for Large-Scale Tournament Payouts (#1)
body:
**Context**: Refactor payout loops in `payout_tournament` to minimize resource consumption and avoid ledger limits.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Add 'Proof of Game' via SHA-256 Move History Hashing (#2)
body:
**Context**: Implement on-chain verification of the full move history hash to ensure game integrity during settlement.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Slashing logic for disconnected players (#3)
body:
**Context**: Detect game abandonment and penalize the staked amount after a timeout threshold.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Implementation of SEP-10 challenge verification (#4)
body:
**Context**: Add native Stellar authentication challenge-response logic for node-level identity.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: On-chain Puzzle Reward Verification (#5)
body:
**Context**: Verify backend signatures for puzzle completions before releasing rewards from the treasury.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Persistent Storage Migration for Player Profiles (#6)
body:
**Context**: Move transient player data from Instance to Persistent storage to ensure long-term availability.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Time-lock escrow for tournament grand prizes (#7)
body:
**Context**: Implement a 24-hour delay on large payouts to allow for cheat-detection review.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Integrate SEP-40: Oracle support for clock sync (#8)
body:
**Context**: Use external oracles to verify game timeouts if ledger time is insufficient.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

title: Contract: Smart contract unit test suite for move sequences (#9)
body:
**Context**: Build a robust test suite in `test.rs` that simulates complex chess variants and edge cases.
**Tasks**: Implement and verify in `contracts/`. **Criteria**: Passes `cargo test`.

body:
